name: motocare-service-tracker
description: MotoCare Service Tracker is a small, real-life usable motorcycle workshop service app.

scripts.db:create: docker exec -it motocare-service-postgres psql -U postgres -c 'CREATE DATABASE motocare_service_test;'
scripts.test:local: npm run db:up && npm run db:test:reset && playwright test --config=playwright.local.config.ts
scripts.test:local:ui: npm run db:up && npm run db:test:reset && playwright test --config=playwright.local.config.ts --ui
scripts.test:local:allure: playwright test -c playwright.local.config.ts && npx allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report
scripts.docker:test:fresh: npm run docker:test:down && npm run docker:test:up && npm run db:test:reset && npm run test:docker
